title: TikTok Shop RAF — Buyer Pre-Shipment Auto-Cancellation Exemption (Leakage 1a)
description: A Refund Administration Fee must be $0 when a buyer initiates a refund before the order is shipped and the cancellation meets TikTok's auto-canceling (24-hour no-action SLA) criteria. RAF deducted on such orders is recoverable.

citation.title: Referral Fee Updates
citation.quote: If a refund is initiated by the buyer before the order is shipped and meets the auto-canceling criteria, no Refund Administration Fee will be charged.

gates.name: Buyer-initiated
gates.description: Cancellation export Cancel By = User; order history shows the cancellation request was submitted by the customer.

gates.name: Before shipment
gates.description: No tracking upload / dispatch; RTS Time empty; the order was canceled pre-shipment.

gates.name: Auto-cancel criteria met
gates.description: Seller Center order-history resolution line shows the cancellation was auto-approved on the 24-hour no-action SLA. NOT present in the export files — must be verified by a human or the Order API. 'Seller canceled' and 'auto-approved' are indistinguishable in the data.
